announcements-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
announcements-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility checks.

announcements-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the ModelMapper dependency from version 3.2.2 to 3.2.6.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
announcements-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce bytecode compatibility with Java 21 APIs, potentially leading to runtime issues if older bytecode is generated or if API usage isn't validated against the target release.

announcements-service/src/main/java/dani.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for Getter, Setter, and NoArgsConstructor.
Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for Getter, Setter, and NoArgsConstructor.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
